strengths: 17+ years of polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets and slightly exceeds the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, showing early but genuine AI builder credibility
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective (founded and actively maintained open-source geo-data platform) and experience in multiple startup environments demonstrating initiative and ownership
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — limited to a 6-month staff role; no demonstrated history of building or leading AI products or platforms at scale required for a director-level AI strategy IC
No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field, and no recognized public standing in the AI community (publications, keynotes, widely adopted AI tools)
Current career gap since October 2025 and a pattern of short tenures raise questions about sustained senior leadership in a large-scale cloud or AI organization

key_factors.factor: Lack of advanced AI degree or industry recognition

response.justification: Bogdan is a capable and versatile engineer with broad full-stack depth and a genuine start in AI tooling, but the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role demands director-level credibility as a recognized AI expert who can advise strategic customers, shape cloud product futures, and inspire large engineering organizations. His AI exposure is limited to six months of infrastructure tooling work, he holds no advanced degree in an AI-adjacent field, and there is no evidence of the kind of scaled AI product ownership, external thought leadership, or advisory track record the role explicitly requires — making him a poor fit at this seniority and specialization level despite his solid foundational engineering career.
